_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1+/- mast cells induce neurofibroma like phenotypes through secreted TGF-beta signaling.

_contextSnippet: Consistent with in vitro studies, TGF-β and Nf1+/− MCCM mediates an increase in the recruitment of Nf1+/− fibroblasts into the matrigel plug.
details: TGF-β and Nf1+/- MCCM mediated increased recruitment of Nf1+/- fibroblasts into matrigel plugs compared to WT mice
